title: Daily Budget Plan
scenario: Create a sample daily budget plan for a working professional, including income, expenses, and savings goals. The output should be in a simple table format.
constraints: Must include income, fixed expenses, and savings goals
Use headers and formatting to make it visually appealing

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt includes the required details (income, fixed expenses, savings goals) and uses headers and formatting.
Evaluate if the table format is consistent throughout the daily budget plan.
Verify if the daily budget plan includes income, expenses, and savings goals.
